title: Pacto de silencio
writer: Julio Coll, Alfonso Sánchez, Manuel Tamayo
actors: Ana Mariscal, Adriano Rimoldi, María Martín
plot: A woman is told his military husband is considered dead, the truth is he has been transferred to the secret service. When he returns to Spain and they get reunited he ends killing a German spy, and then she gets prosecuted.
